vol_high_pattern.name: Volume and High Behavior Pattern
vol_high_pattern.comment: vol_high_pattern = compare(Volume, vol_lag1) + compare(High, high_lag1) = VolUp_HighUp | VolUp_HighDown | VolDown_HighUp | VolDown_HighDown

ibs_volume_pattern.name: IBS and Volume Behavior Pattern
ibs_volume_pattern.comment: ibs_volume_group = compare(Volume, vol_lag1) + compare(IBS, ibs_lag1) = VolUp_IBSUp | VolUp_IBSDown | VolDown_IBSUp | VolDown_IBSDown

high_rsi_pattern.name: High & RSI Pattern
high_rsi_pattern.comment: high_rsi_pattern = compare(High, high_lag1) + compare(RSI, rsi_lag1) = HighUp_RSIUp | HighUp_RSIDown | HighDown_RSIUp | HighDown_RSIDown

long_trend.name: Long Trend
long_trend.comment: StrongUp | StrongDown = EMA_1month > EMA_6months | EMA_1month < EMA_6months

candle_color_sequence.name: Color Continuity
candle_color_sequence.comment: sequence = current_color + prev_color = Bull_Bull | Bull_Bear | Bear_Bull | Bear_Bear

gap_pattern.name: Opening Gap Pattern
gap_pattern.comment: gap_pattern = compare(Open, prev_Close) = GapUp | GapDown | Flat

range_position.name: Day Range Position
range_position.comment: range_pos = (Close - Low) / (High - Low) = Top_Third | Mid_Third | Bottom_Third

distance_from_ma.name: Mean Reversion Distance
distance_from_ma.comment: dist_ma = (Close - EMA_20) / ATR = Overextended_Up | Neutral | Overextended_Down

volume_price_divergence.name: Volume Price Confirmation
volume_price_divergence.comment: vol_price = compare(Vol, vol_lag1) + compare(Abs_Return, abs_ret_lag1) = Effort_Confirmed | Effort_Divergence

effort_result_pattern.name: Effort vs Result
effort_result_pattern.comment: effort_result = compare(Volume, vol_lag1) + compare(abs(Close-Open), abs_body_lag1) = HighEffort_LowResult | HighEffort_HighResult | LowEffort_HighResult | LowEffort_LowResult

ma_distance_group.name: Distance from MA 20
ma_distance_group.comment: ma_dist = (Close - EMA20) / ATR = Extreme_Upper | Above_Mean | Below_Mean | Extreme_Lower

rsi_velocity_pattern.name: RSI Velocity
rsi_velocity_pattern.comment: rsi_velocity = compare(RSI, rsi_lag1) + compare(RSI, rsi_lag2) = Accelerating_Up | Decelerating_Up | Accelerating_Down | Decelerating_Down

price_rsi_divergence.name: Price RSI Divergence Hint
price_rsi_divergence.comment: div_hint = compare(High, high_lag1) + compare(RSI, rsi_lag1) = Bullish_Confirm | Bearish_Divergence | Bearish_Confirm | Bullish_Divergence

ma_slope_direction.name: Trend Slope Direction
ma_slope_direction.comment: ma_slope = compare(EMA_20, EMA_20_lag1) = Uptrend | Downtrend | Sideways

close_return_group.name: Close Return Behavior
close_return_group.comment: close_return = compare(Close, close_lag1) = Up | Down | Flat

return_magnitude_group.name: Return Magnitude
return_magnitude_group.comment: ret_mag = abs(Return) compare ret_avg = LargeMove | NormalMove | SmallMove

close_position_vs_prev_range.name: Close vs Previous Range
close_position_vs_prev_range.comment: close_pos_prev = (Close - prev_Low) / (prev_High - prev_Low) = BreakAbove | Inside | BreakBelow

open_position_vs_prev_range.name: Open vs Previous Range
open_position_vs_prev_range.comment: open_pos_prev = (Open - prev_Low) / (prev_High - prev_Low) = GapBreakUp | Inside | GapBreakDown

wick_to_body_ratio.name: Wick vs Body Strength
wick_to_body_ratio.comment: wick_body = (upper_wick + lower_wick) / body = WickDominant | Balanced | BodyDominant

upper_lower_wick_balance.name: Wick Balance
upper_lower_wick_balance.comment: wick_balance = compare(upper_wick, lower_wick) = UpperDominant | LowerDominant | Symmetric

multi_timeframe_trend_alignment.name: Multi TF Trend Alignment
multi_timeframe_trend_alignment.comment: mtf_trend = EMA_20 > EMA_50 > EMA_200 = StrongBull | StrongBear | Mixed

ema_compression_pattern.name: EMA Compression
ema_compression_pattern.comment: ema_compress = std(EMA_20, EMA_50, EMA_100) = Tight | Expanding

intraday_trend_pattern.name: Intraday Trend Bias
intraday_trend_pattern.comment: intra_trend = compare(Open, Close) + compare(Close, High/Low) = TrendUp | TrendDown | Chop

breakout_strength.name: Breakout Strength
breakout_strength.comment: breakout = (Close > prev_High) + volume_condition = StrongBreak | WeakBreak | NoBreak

false_break_pattern.name: False Break Detection
false_break_pattern.comment: false_break = (High > prev_High AND Close < prev_High) OR (Low < prev_Low AND Close > prev_Low) = BullTrap | BearTrap | None

liquidity_sweep_pattern.name: Liquidity Sweep
liquidity_sweep_pattern.comment: liq_sweep = sweep(prev_high/low) + rejection = SweepHighReject | SweepLowReject | NoSweep

orderflow_proxy_pattern.name: Orderflow Proxy
orderflow_proxy_pattern.comment: orderflow = compare(body_size, wick_size) + volume = AggressiveBuy | AggressiveSell | Passive

imbalance_candle_pattern.name: Imbalance Candle
imbalance_candle_pattern.comment: imbalance = body >> wick AND range_expansion = ImbalanceUp | ImbalanceDown | Balanced

mean_reversion_signal.name: Mean Reversion Signal
mean_reversion_signal.comment: mean_rev = distance_from_ma + rsi_extreme = RevertDown | RevertUp | Neutral

trend_exhaustion_pattern.name: Trend Exhaustion
trend_exhaustion_pattern.comment: exhaustion = HighUp + RSI_Down OR LowDown + RSI_Up = BullExhaust | BearExhaust | None

compression_breakout_setup.name: Compression Breakout Setup
compression_breakout_setup.comment: compression = BB squeeze + low ATR = ReadyBreakout | NotReady

volatility_cluster_pattern.name: Volatility Clustering
volatility_cluster_pattern.comment: vol_cluster = consecutive HighVol OR LowVol = ClusterHigh | ClusterLow | Mixed

price_efficiency_ratio.name: Price Efficiency
price_efficiency_ratio.comment: efficiency = abs(Close - Close_n) / sum(abs(return)) = EfficientTrend | Noisy

micro_trend_pattern.name: Micro Trend
micro_trend_pattern.comment: micro_trend = compare(Close, Close_lag3) = MicroUp | MicroDown | Flat

breakout_failure_strength.name: Breakout Failure Strength
breakout_failure_strength.comment: failure = breakout_attempt + reversal_strength = StrongFailure | WeakFailure | None
